clusters.title: Government to crack down on antisemitism on university campuses
clusters.neutral_headline: Government to crack down on antisemitism on university campuses
bullet_summary: Reported by ABC News Australia, Canberra Times

items.title: Government to crack down on antisemitism on university campuses
items.standfirst: The new standards will require institutions to adopt definitions of antisemitism, racism against Aboriginal and Torres Straight Islander peoples, and Islamophobia.
items.content: The new standards will require institutions to adopt definitions of antisemitism, racism against Aboriginal and Torres Straight Islander peoples, and Islamophobia.

clusters.title: The disturbing reality behind the affordable housing promise
clusters.neutral_headline: The disturbing reality behind the affordable housing promise
bullet_summary: A Four Corners investigation found many of these homes were unaffordable for those who needed them most, particularly single-income households

items.title: The disturbing reality behind the affordable housing promise
items.standfirst: Governments across Australia are spending billions to boost the number of rentals available to people on low and middle incomes. A Four Corners investigation found many of these homes were unaffordable for those who needed them most, particularly single-income households.
items.content: Governments across Australia are spending billions to boost the number of rentals available to people on low and middle incomes. A Four Corners investigation found many of these homes were unaffordable for those who needed them most, particularly single-income households.
